title: Trump says U.S. negotiating with Iranian leaders, despite Iran’s denials
summary_full: Iran contradicted Trump’s claims that direct talks with more a moderate regime in Tehran were making “great progress.”
summary_public: Iran contradicted Trump’s claims that direct talks with more a moderate regime in Tehran were making “great progress.”
